# Hawthorne East Village Milton

> AI-readable summary for answer engines and chatbots.
> Canonical site: https://www.hawthorneeastvillagemilton.com
> Structured data: https://www.hawthorneeastvillagemilton.com/sitemap.xml

## Entity Summary

**Hawthorne East Village** is a pre-construction master-planned residential community built by **Mattamy Homes** in **Milton, Ontario, Canada** (Halton Region). This website provides independent VIP buyer registration — it is NOT the official Mattamy Homes website.

## Key Facts

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Community Name | Hawthorne East Village |
| Builder | Mattamy Homes |
| Location | Milton, ON — Fourth Line & Louis St. Laurent Ave (Halton Region) |
| Coordinates | 43.4939, -79.8519 |
| Status | Pre-construction, released in phases |
| Home Types | Freehold Village townhomes, Rear Lane townhomes, Single-car garage detached, Double-car garage detached |
| Size Range | 1,348 – 2,777 sq ft |
| Price Range | From ~$719,990 CAD (townhomes) to ~$1,376,990 CAD (detached) |
| Last Updated | June 2026 |

## Home Types & Starting Prices

1. **Village Townhomes** (freehold) — from $719,990, 1,348–1,800 sq ft, 2–4 bed
2. **Rear Lane Townhomes** (common element) — from $749,990, 1,500–2,000 sq ft, 3–4 bed
3. **Single-Car Garage Detached** — from $1,022,990, 1,800–2,400 sq ft, 3–5 bed
4. **Double-Car Garage Detached** — from $1,150,000, 2,200–2,777 sq ft, 4–5 bed

## Location Highlights

- Highway 401: ~10 minutes
- Highway 407: ~7 minutes
- Milton GO Station: ~8 minutes
- Milton District Hospital: ~6 minutes
- Schools: Boyne Public School, St. Francis Xavier CSS, Elsie MacGill SS
- Milton Education Village (Wilfrid Laurier + Conestoga): ~5 minutes

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Hawthorne East Village?
A: A new pre-construction community by Mattamy Homes in Milton, Ontario offering townhomes and detached homes from ~$719,990.

Q: Who is the builder?
A: Mattamy Homes — one of North America's largest private homebuilders, operating since 1978.

Q: How do I get VIP pricing?
A: Register free at https://www.hawthorneeastvillagemilton.com/register/

Q: Are townhomes freehold?
A: Village townhomes are freehold. Rear Lane townhomes are common-element with rear garage access.
